verdict.note: Blocked by a PRE-EXISTING crash unrelated to this change. The status-colour code is in place (m-sess-status now reads the shared STATUS_COLOR map, mirroring the verified desktop surfaces), but the mobile surface cannot be reached live: on a sub-640px viewport MobileApp renders the default Specs tab, whose MobileNode to SpecPane path throws (Cannot read properties of undefined reading split, NodeView.jsx line 48, an undefined spec body) and blanks the app before the Sessions tab is reachable. Reproduced identically on MAIN (port 5173, unmodified), so it predates and is independent of the status-colour change. Desktop status-colour is filed pass with live evidence; mobile visual confirmation awaits a fix of the MobileNode crash.

Reproduced identically on MAIN (port 5173, unmodified), so it predates and is independent of the status-colour change. Desktop status-colour is filed pass with live evidence; mobile visual confirmation awaits a fix of the MobileNode crash.

re-measure after MobileApp became its own lazy chunk (no xyflow/xterm on the phone path): 390px viewport, sessions tab lists 5 sessions each with its STATUS_COLOR-painted status word (working green / asking yellow / close-pending grey); 0 console errors.

headless-Chromium re-measure at 1623280b (worktree vite :5199 + spex serve :8898): 390px viewport, lazy MobileApp chunk, sessions tab rows all carry STATUS_COLOR-painted status words, 0 console errors.

phone viewport 390x844, worktree vite+serve, REAL dispatched worker (claude-glm): timeline rendered queued→working→asking with the full 240-char note; composer chip default ON; send → 'you ↩ note' event within one refresh, draft cleared; agent flipped to working, then declared done --propose close whose FULL >400-char note (echo + fun fact) rendered as the reply; zero terminal elements mounted. Video = the send interaction; images = list & final conversation.

list rows: asking/review rgb(181,137,0) yellow, working rgb(133,153,0) green; opened detail status word asking rgb(181,137,0) — bucket hues from the one STATUS_COLOR map, zone-grouped list (NEEDS YOU / RUNNING), never flat grey

re-measure post 8264fb3a (tag relabel only): sent event now renders 我 [已请求 note 回复] — the tag names the request riding the send, not a storage place; verified against a synthetic timeline (sent event with replyVia:note) through the real dashboard at 390x844, zh locale. The full live-worker loop remains anchored at 14bd92a0.

re-measure post 0bf61611 (one-face unification): list rows are the shared one-line glyph face — asking '?' rgb(181,137,0), working '●' rgb(133,153,0), parked '‖' green; detail header word 待答 rgb(181,137,0); 0 avatars in rows/header, 0 .sess-status spans, fold pods present — the retired two-row face is nowhere

re-measure post 0bf61611 (presentation trims: sent-event note tag removed, header avatar removed): conversation renders intact — status events + full notes + sent messages + composer with default-on note-reply chip; 0 .m-ev-notetag elements. The full live-worker loop remains anchored at 14bd92a0

re-measure post a77eb2d5 (chip deleted): composer is bare (0 .m-chip, zero note-reply verbiage in the whole DOM) yet the wire body still silently carries replyVia:'note' ({kind:text,text:测试一下,replyVia:note} intercepted); timeline/notes render unchanged. Full live loop anchored at 14bd92a0.

A/reproduce (field-reported live): the node eval tab renders NOTHING — MobileNode's pane host has no eval branch (evalPane:false, hostChildren:0 on mobile-ui's own eval tab); and the history pane's .ev-diff scrolls sideways 392px (desktop overflow-x:auto + white-space:pre leaking into the phone shell)

B/fix verified: eval tab renders 14 reading rows (EvalPane mounted); h-scroller scan across spec/history/eval/timeline surfaces finds ZERO sideways scrollers (ev-diff wraps: history pane spill 392px→0); docSpill false
re-measure post c2368a13 (title bar removed): list glyphs 待答 rgb(181,137,0) / 工作中·驻留 rgb(133,153,0), detail word 待答 yellow — bucket hues intact; zero .m-topbar/.m-brand elements
re-measure post c2368a13 (title bar removed; back chevron moved into the detail header card): timeline + bare composer render unchanged; back returns to the list. Full live loop anchored at 14bd92a0

A/reproduce (field report: the children/spec/history/issues/eval tab row shows a dead un-draggable horizontal scrollbar on a parent node): .m-tabs and .m-crumbs are overflow-x:auto+nowrap with a webkit-only scrollbar-hiding hack some phone engines ignore — at 360px the crumbs actually spill 30px, the tab row is one font-metric away from the same

B/fix: .m-tabs/.m-crumbs flex-wrap (overflow visible, zero spill at 360px, tab row lays out in rows instead of hiding sideways); full re-scan across eval/spec/timeline surfaces still 0 horizontal scrollers, eval pane renders 18 rows

A/reproduce: phone viewport, fixture timeline (41 events, scrollHeight 3202 vs client 587). Scrolled up to 200; at the next 8s poll scrollTop jumps 200→2615 (bottom) — samples [200×6, 2615×6]. The poll swaps in a fresh events array every tick and the pin effect fires unconditionally. Also captured: the session-detail tab row renders ['timeline','changing 0 nodes'] (issue-3 before-state).

B/fix: pinnedRef + identity-stable poll (sameEvents keeps the old array on a no-change tick). Video: opens pinned bottom; parked at 200 holds through no-change polls [200×10] AND through a NEW event landing (scrollHeight 2873→2955, still 200); back at bottom, the next new event is followed chat-style (3037, pinned). Tab row gone — detail is header+timeline+composer; freed line goes to the conversation (client 587→628).

Phone viewport 390x844 (headless Chromium via worktree vite :5199 → live :8787): create row above sessions list → full-screen composer; launcher select options+default matched /api/settings (claude-glm default, picked reclaude); launch busy-gated, returned to list; the REAL launched agent declared done ('mobile create entry smoke test ok'); remembered pick survived reopen. Desktop New tab regression-smoked after the launch.js extraction (launchers + preset palette intact). Test session b98ecc25 closed after.
复现：手机视口打开 session 详情，timeline 加载中的占位符显示的是图形 HUD 的 'loading specs from git…'（中文「正在从 git 加载规格…」）——MobileApp.jsx 借用了 hud.loading，会话界面谎称在加载规格。
修复后：timeline 加载占位符显示通用 'loading…'（common.loading），不再是图形 HUD 的 'loading specs from git…'。真机 Chromium 手机视口（390×844）实测。

手机视口打开 session 29dadb1d（4 个改动节点、真实读数）：header 的 eval 入口打开评测面板——门禁条 ✓lint/✓merge/✓ahead/✓committed、✦ 本会话计数、34 行读数按节点分组、INHERITED 分隔线、行点选下方出共享详情；.fv-master 实测单列（390px），fold 隐藏，无横向滚动；再点 eval 返回对话。lazy chunk 仅在进入时加载。
eval 入口加入 header 后重测：打开即钉底 ✓；上滚停驻 scrollTop=120，跨 12s（>1 个 8s 轮询周期）每秒采样全部保持 120，从未被拉回 ✓；对话仍无 tab 行（header 唯一新增控件是 eval 入口）。

styles.css 变更（新增 .m-sess-evalbtn/.m-eval-host 规则）后重测：8 行实测 glyph 计算色全部命中 STATUS_COLOR 四色桶——review/asking rgb(181,137,0)、close-pending rgb(147,161,161)、working/parked rgb(133,153,0)；无 avatar 无两行旧脸；打开详情 status 词同桶色。

MobileApp/styles.css 变更后重测：钻取 spexcode›spec-dashboard›dashboard-ui›mobile-ui，5 个 tab（edit/spec/history/issues/eval）逐一真开——每个都有真实内容（eval tab 渲染读数行 2553 字符，非空壳），全 .m-app 扫描 overflow-x auto/scroll 且 scrollWidth>clientWidth 的元素为 0，document 也无横滚。

重测（真实创建回环）：＋入口→全屏 composer；launcher select 选项 [claude-glm,codex,reclaude] 与 /api/settings 完全一致、默认 claude-glm；launch 按钮 busy（'launching…'，双击护栏）；成功返回列表，新行在一次 board push 内出现（SessionRow 共享脸）。冒烟 worker 8f537c5c 真实启动并随后完成对话回环，测后关闭。

重测（与 create 场景同一真实回环，worker 8f537c5c/claude-glm）：时间线 oldest-first、状态词着色+HH:MM、申报 note 全文成块显示（'手机端冒烟测试就绪…'未截断）；composer 全裸（chip/toggle 扫描=0）；发送 'MOBILE-PING-d265' 即刻渲染为 you 事件、草稿清空；agent 真实收到（record 翻 active），replyVia:note 静默生效——其下一次申报 note『MOBILE-PING-d265 已收到』落回同一时间线（录像为 note 落地段；发送段在 create 场景录像内）。全程无终端挂载。

Re-measured with NEW-harness sessions on the board (opencode ba5610c2 asking, pi 8d5595e2/b8d70266 working). 390×844 viewport → MobileApp; Sessions tab, nest folds expanded: 13 one-line SessionRow faces, computed glyph colors read from the DOM — working/parked rgb(133,153,0) green, asking rgb(181,137,0) yellow, close-pending rgb(147,161,161) grey — the STATUS_COLOR buckets, never flat grey. Zero avatars, zero status-word second lines (retired two-row face absent). Detail headers: the opencode session's word 'asking' painted yellow, the pi session's 'working' green — same hues as desktop. New-harness statuses derive correctly (opencode flipped asking after declaring; pi working while active).

Re-measured on an OPENCODE session (ba5610c2, the harness-sensitive deliver path). 390×844 MobileApp, session detail: timeline renders the recorded transitions oldest-first (original ask fold, queued/working/asking with HH:MM, the asking declaration's FULL note '已完成 harness.ts 阅读总结,待命中' as a block); NO terminal mounted (no .xterm), no tab row above the timeline, no chips/mode controls — bare composer only. Sent a message: the 'you' event (m-ev-sent) appeared and the draft cleared at 2s, the agent RECEIVED it (status flipped working at 2s — opencode deliver works), and its reply — the next declaration's full note ('完成 harness.ts 阅读总结:四个 adapter(claude/codex/pi/opencode)在 pan…') — landed in the SAME timeline at 14s via the surface's silent replyVia:note. Whole interaction on video.

Re-measured with the NEW launchers configured (the harness-sensitive half: launcher fetch + launch path). 390×844 MobileApp → Sessions tab → create row → full-screen composer: the native select lists EXACTLY the /api/settings profiles (claude-glm, codex, opencode, pi, reclaude) and pre-selects the same default the desktop New tab resolves (claude-glm, sessions.defaultLauncher). Picked OPENCODE, typed a task, tapped launch: button busy 0–2s (double-tap guard) while the backend built worktree+agent, then the surface returned to the sessions list with the new row present within one board push. Backend record confirms the create went through the one launch path: session e36fb097, launcher=opencode, harness=opencode, status working. Whole interaction on video.
